Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "MONEYMINEFIELD-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Money Minefield (Luna Software).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Disables the RUN/STOP key by modifying the STOP vector by setting $FE at $0328. 3. Executes the RUN command to start the command to start the game program.
Note: To remove the long delay caused by the initialisation code on lines 102 to 110 when starting the game, the following steps were used:
1. Once the game was fully loaded, the C1=59 statement at the start of line 112 was changed to the STOP command 2. The game program is then run, which breaks after the init code on lines 102 to 110 are executed 3. The STOP statement at the start of line 112 was changed back to C1=59 4. A GOTO 112 statement was added to the end of line 100 so that the init code is skipped when the program is run 5. Now the memory dump was taken as normal
